subject: Add msb config to vnf adapter

Patch Set 1:

so pods are waiting for so-mariadb and this pod is not deployed (as there's been a move to common mariadb I guess) so we cannot see if the change is working or not.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

So, is there anything I need to do? Or, just wait for CI to get fixed? (I'm assuming errors are some other issue unrelated to this patch)
Change has been successfully merged by James MacNider
